message:
feat(obligation): convert two_phase protocol to session_protocol! macro (bd-3u5d3.5)

Replace hand-written two_phase module with session_protocol! macro
invocation using new parameterized obligation syntax: `(kind: ObligationKind)`.
The macro now supports both fixed (`for Variant`) and parameterized
obligation kinds. Added 2 new macro tests (parse + codegen) for the
parameterized case. All 9 session type tests pass, all 56 macro tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
